headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -148.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 84% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.12)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 139 quotes, driven by an overwhelming 136 strong-intensity comments - people are extremely agitated today.

• This frustration surge jumps from yesterday's 48 to near the 106-day peak of 162, marking one of the most intense periods on record.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's deep negative while optimism turned negative after a brief positive day.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
